content.full_text:
18 January 1990

Kathryn E. Donovan, General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J. Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Ms. Donovan,

I recently ran unsuccessfully in the 07 November Newport-Mesa Unified School District Board of Trustees election.
I am considering running again in another election, therefore I do not plan to close my bank account.
I would like to know if it is legal to spend money from my Wendy Leece for School Board account to purchase the following:

1. Subscriptions to newspapers or magazines which include information about national policies which affect education and schools.

2. Membership in organizations which would help my candidacy in the future.

3. Also, should I run for another office, other than School Board, can I use the money for the campaign?

I would appreciate your opinion on these proposed expenditures.

Sincerely,

Wendy Leece
1107 Valley Circle
Costa Mesa, CA 92627
714-645-8319
